arts.ttl: Arsenal scan Bukayo Saka for season-ending injury
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka picked up a serious hamstring injury during Arsenal's 5-1 victory over Crystal Palace last weekend.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland 'stay humble' Arsenal dig continues to backfire amid shocking Man City moment
arts.sum: In 17 games, Haaland managed just eight goals, taking 70 shots with an 11.4% conversion rate. Up to and including the match with Arsenal, Haaland scored 10 goals in six matches, taking 28 shots with a conversion rate of 35.7%.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal fans celebrated Mohamed Salah's Christmas post despite flawed Liverpool superstition - Tom Canton
arts.sum: Yet, the focus on Christmas Day for many Arsenal fans online turned to Liverpool’s star man Mohamed Salah. Arsenal supporters who have some superstitions it seems have latched on to this again and are hoping that another Christmas post from Salah spells the beginning of a poor run for Arne Slot’s side.

arts.ttl: Why do footballers cut holes in their socks? Trend involving Bukayo Saka and James Maddison explained
arts.sum: The trend involving James Maddison and Bukayo Saka explained 🧦

arts.ttl: Arsenal fight Chelsea and Spurs for left-sided Ben White
arts.sum: Arsenal have enjoyed great success down the right with Ben White in that area of the park, and according to data analytics firm SciSports, there is a strong resemblance in style between the former Brighton star and De Cuyper. Arsenal, meanwhile, lead the chase for the player, yet Arteta will struggle to land him during January because De Cuyper wants to remain with Club Brugge until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make unusual Bukayo Saka decision as injury concerns come to light
arts.sum: Arsenal winger Bukayo Saka suffered a hamstring injury in their recent 5-1 win over Crystal Palace and is expected to be out of action for a significant period of time

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus, David Raya could break Arsenal records in Ipswich Town Premier League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal duo David Raya and Gabriel Jesus could both set new Gunners records when Mikel Arteta's side host Ipswich Town on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could be option for potential Bukayo Saka replacement – Gunners need to be wary of Aston Villa
arts.sum: Last week, Aston Villa had emerged as a suitor for AC Milan’s Samuel Chukwueze. It now seems as if Arsenal could also become a potential destination for the Nigerian. This comes from MilanLive, who assess the winger’s situation and they believe that Arsenal is the most ‘interesting option’ for the 25-year-old. With Bukayo Saka out The post Arsenal could be option for potential Bukayo Saka replacement – Gunners need to be wary of Aston Villa appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright fires double Arsenal transfer demand in response to major Bukayo Saka blow
arts.sum: "I'd like their people to have a look at Omar Marmoush at Eintracht Frankfurt and Ademola Lookman at Atalanta." Ian Wright reckons Arsenal can still make up for Bukayo Saka's injury by signing two reinforcements in January.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to sign £100m striker as Mikel Arteta reveals defender transfer plan
arts.sum: The January window opens next week and Arsenal will be one of 20 Premier League clubs able to conduct transfer business once again. "If Arsenal want to win the Premier League title, they should go to Newcastle and bang £100million on the table for Isak as soon as the January transfer window opens.
